---
title: "Session 4: Annotation Principles & Inter-Annotator Agreement"
subtitle: "Day 2 · Annotation, Gold Standards & Metrics (2-1)"
format: revealjs
metadata-files:
  - _slides.yml
---

<!-- STUB DECK — structure only; content to be filled in before the course. -->

# Session 4: Annotation Principles & Inter-Annotator Agreement

## 📋 Agenda

- Annotation principles
- The NLP pipeline for applied linguistics
- Introduction to gold-standard dataset construction

## 🎯 Learning Objectives

By the end of this session, you will be able to:

<!-- to be added -->

# Annotation principles

## Annotation principles

<!-- to be added -->

# The NLP pipeline

## The NLP pipeline

<!-- to be added -->

# Gold-standard construction

## Gold-standard construction

<!-- to be added -->

# Any questions?
